title: Spire Clinic - Orthopedic Clinic in Bangalore
description: Spire clinic in Malleshwaram is your one stop shop for all your orthopedic health needs. Our Orthopedic specialists, Dr. Deepak, Dr. Harish & Dr. Vinit are the best orthopedic surgeons in town.
text:
Spire Clinic - Orthopedic Clinic in Bangalore Skip to content Home About Us Services Close Services Open Services Joint Replacement Arthroscopy Fracture Care Arthritis Care Pediatric Orthopaedics Orthopaedic Oncology Sports Medicine Spine Care Our Doctors Close Our Doctors Open Our Doctors Dr. Deepak G Shivarathre Dr. Harish Puranik Dr. Vinit Oswal Blogs Contact Us Book An Appointment Home About Us Services Close Services Open Services Joint Replacement Arthroscopy Fracture Care Arthritis Care Pediatric Orthopaedics Orthopaedic Oncology Sports Medicine Spine Care Our Doctors Close Our Doctors Open Our Doctors Dr. Deepak G Shivarathre Dr. Harish Puranik Dr. Vinit Oswal Blogs Contact Us Book An Appointment Joint Replacements Arthroscopy Fracture Arthritis Paediatric Orthopaedics Orthopaedic Oncology Sports Medicine Spine Care Joint Replacements Arthroscopy Fracture Arthritis Paediatric Orthopaedics Orthopaedic Oncology Sports Medicine Spine Care About Us At Spire Clinic, we understand that orthopaedic pain and mobility challenges can profoundly impact every aspect of your life—from the simple joy of walking pain-free to pursuing the activities you love. At Spire Clinic we are globally trained orthopaedic surgeons, each with years of dedicated experience and a proven track record of successful outcomes across the complete spectrum of musculoskeletal care. From joint replacement surgeries—knee replacement, hip replacement, and shoulder replacement (including primary, complex, and revision procedures)—to sports injuries treated through advanced keyhole surgery (ACL reconstruction, PCL repair, meniscus repair, Bankart procedure, rotator cuff repair, ATFL reconstruction), fracture surgeries for simple and complex fractures including open and compound fractures, spine surgeries, paediatric orthopaedics and deformity corrections, and regenerative orthopaedics (PRP, GFC, BMAC)—we’re here to address every orthopaedic concern with expertise, precision, and genuine care. What truly sets us apart is our unwavering belief that exceptional orthopaedic care extends far beyond the operating room. Our commitment to you doesn’t end when your surgery is complete—it continues throughout your entire recovery journey and beyond. We take the time to understand your unique situation, listen to your concerns, and develop personalised treatment plans that align with your individual goals and lifestyle. Whether you’re seeking relief from chronic joint pain, recovering from a sports injury, or looking for the best orthopaedic surgeon in Bangalore for your child’s condition, you’ll find compassionate, patient-centred care at Spire Clinic. Your healing, your comfort, and your return to the life you deserve—that’s our commitment, every step of the way Book an Appointment Our Combined Experience Metrics Surgeries 0 + Years of Experience 0 + Happy Patients 0 + Combined Experience Metrics Surgeries 20000 + Years of Experience 35 + Happy Patients 50000 + 20,000+ Surgeries 35+ Years Of Experience 50,000+ Happy Patients Why Choose Spire Clinic?
